products.name: 🧠 Notion Life OS
products.description: A beautifully organized, interconnected dashboard to manage your entire life from one place. Includes 7 interconnected databases and 5 dashboard views for solopreneurs and professionals who want clarity, momentum, and control.
features: 🏠 Command Center — Your daily home base with priorities, deadlines & habits
🎯 Goals & OKRs — Track quarterly objectives with measurable key results
✅ Task Manager — Full task management with priority tagging
📅 Content Calendar — Plan and schedule business content
💰 Finance Tracker — Track income, expenses, and invoices
📓 Journal & Reflections — Daily journaling with guided prompts
🏃 Habits & Routines — Track daily habits with visual streaks
products.delivery_note: Download includes: Notion template link, setup guide, database schemas

products.name: 📊 Google Sheets Budget Planner
products.description: A powerful yet simple Google Sheets budget tracker designed for freelancers and solopreneurs. Track income, expenses, savings goals, and get a clear picture of your financial health — all in one spreadsheet.
features: 💰 Income & Expense Tracking — Log transactions with categories
🎯 Savings Goals — Set and track progress toward financial targets
📈 Monthly Dashboard — Visual overview of your finances
📊 Annual Summary — See your full year at a glance
🏷️ Category Breakdown — Know where your money is going
📱 Mobile-friendly — Works perfectly in the Google Sheets app
products.delivery_note: Download includes: CSV import templates, setup guide, template link

products.name: 📝 PDF Weekly Planner
products.description: A clean, minimalist weekly planner PDF designed for focused professionals. Print it out or use it digitally with a PDF annotation app. Stay on top of your week without the digital noise.
features: 📅 Weekly Overview — See your entire week at a glance
✅ Priority Task List — Focus on what matters most
⏰ Time-blocked Schedule — Plan your day in 1-hour blocks
📝 Notes Section — Capture ideas and meeting notes
💧 Habit Tracker — Build daily routines with checkboxes
🙏 Gratitude Log — End each day with reflection
products.delivery_note: Download includes: 42-page PDF planner (print-ready, letter size)

products.name: 📅 Notion Content Calendar
products.tagline: Plan, Create, and Track All Your Content
products.description: A powerful Notion content planning dashboard with 5 interconnected databases: Command Center, Ideas Bank, Content Calendar, Analytics, and Topic Clusters. Perfect for creators managing multiple platforms.
features: 📋 Command Center — Daily content overview and priorities
💡 Ideas Bank — Capture and organize content ideas
📅 Content Calendar — Monthly grid view of scheduled content
📊 Analytics & Performance — Track engagement by platform
🔍 Topic Clusters & SEO — Organize content by theme
📱 Platform-specific views — Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, Blog
products.delivery_note: Download includes: Notion template link, setup guide, database schemas

products.name: 💼 Google Sheets Invoice Tracker
products.description: A comprehensive Google Sheets invoice tracker with 5 sheets: Dashboard, Invoice Log, Client Directory, Revenue Report, and Payment Tracker. Perfect for freelancers tracking invoices and payments.
features: 📊 Dashboard — Overview of outstanding, paid, and overdue invoices
📋 Invoice Log — Track every invoice with status and amounts
👥 Client Directory — Store client info, rates, and payment terms
💰 Revenue Report — Monthly and yearly revenue summaries
🔔 Payment Tracker — Auto-calculated overdue flags
products.delivery_note: Download includes: Google Sheets link + CSV templates + setup guide

products.name: 🎯 PDF Goal-Setting Planner
products.tagline: Turn Your Dreams Into Actionable Plans
products.description: A 38-page printable PDF workbook that guides you from big dreams to daily action. Includes 90-Day SMART Goal setting, Monthly Action Plans, Habit Trackers, and Review pages.
features: 🌟 Big Dreams — Vision mapping for 6 life areas
🎯 90-Day SMART Goals — Break dreams into actionable goals
📆 Monthly Action Plans — Step-by-step monthly breakdown
✅ 30-Day Habit Tracker — Build habits that support your goals
📓 Monthly Reviews — Reflect, adjust, and improve
🏁 90-Day Review — Full retrospective and next quarter planning
includes: Undated — use any year, any quarter
products.delivery_note: Download includes: 38-page PDF planner (print-ready, letter size)
